title: The Anti-Apartheid (United Nations Convention) Act, 1981
full_text: The Anti-Apartheid (United Nations Convention) Act, 1981 रंगभेद विरोधी (संयुक्‍त राष्‍ट्र कन्‍वेंशन) अधिनियम,1981 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198148 Act Number: 48 Enactment Date: 1981-12-18 Act Year: 1981 Short Title: The Anti-Apartheid (United Nations Convention) Act, 1981 Hindi Title: रंगभेद विरोधी (संयुक्‍त राष्‍ट्र कन्‍वेंशन) अधिनियम,1981 Long Title: An Act to give effect to the International Convention on the Suppression and Punishment of the Crime of Apartheid. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 18-12-1981 Schedule 1. Provisions as to Extradition Act. Schedule 1.
